languages.text: {n}Геральдические символы, отлитые в благородной бронзе, вне всяких сомнений принадлежат династии фон Валанциус. Привлекают внимание лишь детали — некоторые элементы орнамента и архаический шрифт. Из них можно сделать заключение, что возраст герба, как и самой стены, составляет несколько веков.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Геральдические символы, отлитые в благородной бронзе, вне всяких сомнений принадлежат династии фон Валанциус. Привлекают внимание лишь детали — некоторые элементы орнамента и архаический шрифт. Из них можно сделать заключение, что возраст герба, как и самой стены, составляет несколько веков.{/n}

languages.text: {n}The heraldic symbols cast in noble bronze are undoubtedly from the von Valancius dynasty. Only certain details draw your eye — some elements of the ornamentation and the archaic script. They indicate that the coat of arms, as well as the wall itself, is several centuries old.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Геральдические символы, отлитые в благородной бронзе, вне всяких сомнений принадлежат династии фон Валанциус. Only certain details draw your eye — some elements of the ornamentation and the archaic script. They indicate that the coat of arms, as well as the wall itself, is several centuries old.{/n}

{n}The heraldic symbols cast in noble bronze are undoubtedly from the von Valancius dynasty. Only certain details draw your eye — some elements of the ornamentation and the archaic script. They indicate that the coat of arms, as well as the wall itself, is several centuries old.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Los símbolos heráldicos labrados en bronce pertenecen indudablemente a la dinastía von Valancius, pero hay ciertos detalles que te llaman la atención, concretamente algunas de las decoraciones y el texto arcaico. Indican que el escudo, al igual que la pared que adorna, tiene varios siglos de antigüedad.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The heraldic symbols cast in noble bronze are undoubtedly from the von Valancius dynasty. Only certain details draw your eye — some elements of the ornamentation and the archaic script. They indicate that the coat of arms, as well as the wall itself, is several centuries old.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Los símbolos heráldicos labrados en bronce pertenecen indudablemente a la dinastía von Valancius, pero hay ciertos detalles que te llaman la atención, concretamente algunas de las decoraciones y el texto arcaico. Indican que el escudo, al igual que la pared que adorna, tiene varios siglos de antigüedad.{/n}

languages.text: {n}这些用贵重青铜铸成的纹章，毫无疑问属于冯·瓦兰修斯王朝。只是某些细节吸引了你的注意——一些装饰元素，以及那古老的字体。它们表明，那枚家徽以及整面墙都已经存在了数百年。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The heraldic symbols cast in noble bronze are undoubtedly from the von Valancius dynasty. Only certain details draw your eye — some elements of the ornamentation and the archaic script. They indicate that the coat of arms, as well as the wall itself, is several centuries old.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}这些用贵重青铜铸成的纹章，毫无疑问属于冯·瓦兰修斯王朝。只是某些细节吸引了你的注意——一些装饰元素，以及那古老的字体。它们表明，那枚家徽以及整面墙都已经存在了数百年。{/n}

languages.text: {n}Les symboles héraldiques coulés dans un bronze des plus nobles appartiennent sans doute possible à la dynastie von Valancius. Seuls quelques détails attirent votre regard : certains éléments de décoration et l'écriture archaïque indiquent que le blason, ainsi que le mur lui-même, sont vieux de plusieurs siècles.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The heraldic symbols cast in noble bronze are undoubtedly from the von Valancius dynasty. Only certain details draw your eye — some elements of the ornamentation and the archaic script. They indicate that the coat of arms, as well as the wall itself, is several centuries old.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Les symboles héraldiques coulés dans un bronze des plus nobles appartiennent sans doute possible à la dynastie von Valancius. Seuls quelques détails attirent votre regard : certains éléments de décoration et l'écriture archaïque indiquent que le blason, ainsi que le mur lui-même, sont vieux de plusieurs siècles.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Soylu bronzdan dökülmüş hanedan sembolleri, şüphesiz von Valancius hanedanlığına ait. Sadece belirli detaylar gözünüze çarpıyor: Süslemenin bazı unsurları ve arkaik yazı. Bunlar, armanın ve duvarın kendisinin birkaç asırlık olduğunu gösteriyor.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The heraldic symbols cast in noble bronze are undoubtedly from the von Valancius dynasty. Only certain details draw your eye — some elements of the ornamentation and the archaic script. They indicate that the coat of arms, as well as the wall itself, is several centuries old.{/n}

languages.text: {n}この紋章は、貴族の銅で鋳造されたもので、間違いなくフォン・ヴァランキウス家のものです。紋章の装飾や古風な文字など、いくつかの細部が目を引きます。この紋章は、この壁と同じく、数世紀前のものです。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The heraldic symbols cast in noble bronze are undoubtedly from the von Valancius dynasty. Only certain details draw your eye — some elements of the ornamentation and the archaic script. They indicate that the coat of arms, as well as the wall itself, is several centuries old.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}この紋章は、貴族の銅で鋳造されたもので、間違いなくフォン・ヴァランキウス家のものです。紋章の装飾や古風な文字など、いくつかの細部が目を引きます。この紋章は、この壁と同じく、数世紀前のものです。{/n}

languages.text: {n}Die in Bronze gegossenen heraldischen Symbole gehören zweifellos der Dynastie derer von Valancius. Mehrere Details stechen dir ins Auge ... einige Elemente der Ornamentik und die archaische Schrift. Sie deuten an, dass das Wappen ebenso wie die Wand selbst mehrere Jahrhunderte alt ist.{/n}
